emails.subject: meter 986315 Torch Rally/El Sordo 1/00
emails.body: Sheryln, I'm forwarding this to Daren to get your answer... Daren, deal 141186 (El Sordo) volume 102.... deal 138605 (Torch) volume 343... Megan Parker thinks that all of this volume should be under Torch... What do you think? Forwarded by Kimberly Vaughn/HOU/ECT on 02/22/2000 03:17 PM From: Sherlyn Schumack 02/22/2000 01:15 PM
